BAZEL_VERSION.description: Specific version of bazel to install. Can be a numeric version or an alias.

BAZEL_INSTALL_METHOD.description: How to install BAZEL. 'system' uses the native OS package manager, 'source' compiles/downloads binaries.

LIBSCRIPT_LISTEN_SOCKET.description: Global unix socket to listen on

BAZEL_LISTEN_PORT.description: Port for BAZEL to listen on

BAZEL_LISTEN_ADDRESS.description: Address for BAZEL to listen on

BAZEL_LISTEN_SOCKET.description: Unix socket for BAZEL to listen on
